# Unshakeable Foundation
## Scripture
"Whoever walks with the wise becomes wise, but the companion of fools will suffer harm." – Proverbs 13:20
## Reflection
As warriors of Christ, we strive to build a strong foundation that can withstand the challenges of life. We are not just fighting for ourselves, but for our families, our communities, and our faith. In today's verse, we are reminded of the importance of surrounding ourselves with wise and godly men who will encourage and support us on our journey. Just as a house built on solid ground can weather any storm, a man who walks with the wise will be better equipped to face life's challenges. Let us be intentional about seeking out mentors, peers, and friends who will help us build a strong foundation in Christ.

## Daily Challenge
"Today, take 10 minutes to connect with a fellow warrior of Christ and ask for his advice on a challenge you're facing."
